LanguageData.VFED_ImperialDefenses.description: Create Whitespring megaturrets: Kontarion, Onager and Palintone, as well as their ammunition.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialDefenses.label: Whitespringi kaitsed
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialWarSolutions.description: Craft powerful Whitespring mortar shells, such as shrapnel, armor piercing and cluster.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialWarSolutions.label: Valgekevade sõja lahendused
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteDemolition.label: Whitespring war solutions
LanguageData.VFEE_JanissaryGear.description: Craft heavy trooper armor, light powered armor that’s commonly used by Whitespring recon troops. Note that these also require advanced components.
LanguageData.VFEE_NobleDecorations.description: Ehitage presidendi sisekujundus, nagu Whitespringi vaibad, peeglid, uhked toolid, Whitespringi tahvlid, kandelinad ja palju muud.
LanguageData.VFEE_NobleDecorations.label: presidendi sisekujundus
LanguageData.VFEE_StellicThrone.description: Ehitage presidendi lauatool, mis sobib Whitespringi kõrgematele ametnikele ja nende tseremoniaalsetele ülesannetele.
LanguageData.VFEE_StellicThrone.label: presidendi lauatool
